meaning: car(t) 拉利马车(一种可坐4人的两轮轻便马车)
examples: Slung over the back of the sofa is an antique ralli quilt (sometimes called a marriage blanket) from Pakistan or India.
There is only one police station geared up to take the claims in Athens, in a squalid industrial wasteland, called Petrou Ralli.
It may be noted that weaving craft was prevalent in Cholistan villages which along with falasi making, embellished ralli and simple ralli work was traditionally practiced.
